installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack prepare pnpm@10.6.0 --activate && corepack pnpm install
buildCommand: cd ../.. && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project packages/shared/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project packages/db/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project services/media/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --project services/providers/sora/tsconfig.json && cd apps/web && node ../../node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
